nasb.text: Shout joyfully to the Lord, all the earth; Break forth and sing for joy and sing praises.

esv.text: Make a joyful noise to the Lord, all the earth; break forth into joyous song and sing praises!

cnv.text: 全地都要向耶和華歡呼， 要發聲歡唱，要歌頌。

ccb.text: 普世要向耶和华欢呼， 欢欢喜喜地高声颂扬。

csbs.text: 全地啊，你们当向耶和华欢呼， 当放声欢唱、歌颂！
